html:
Exclusive to:

The Onion is a vegetable food item in Don't Starve Together. Onions can be farmed with a small chance to appear from normal Seeds or directly planted using Onion Seeds. Feeding an Onion to a bird in a Birdcage will produce 1 Pointy Seeds, as of the "Reap What You Sow" update.

When eaten raw, Onion restores 9.375 Hunger at the cost of 10 Sanity. They take 15 days to spoil.

It can be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes and is required for Salsa Fresca, Bone Bouillon, Grim Galette and Moqueca.

Roasted Onion

A Roasted Onion is obtained by cooking an Onion over a fire. It restores 1 more Health and deducts 5 less Sanity than the raw version and takes 10 days to spoil. Besides this, it shares the same uses as raw Onions.

 Usage

Recipes

×2

Fillers can not be Inedible, Meats or Eggs

×(1)

Filler can not be Inedible

×2

Filler can not be Twigs

The Gorge

Only during the Event: The Gorge
Onions are featured in The Gorge event in Don't Starve Together. They grow from Pointy Seeds, which can be bought from Sammy for one Old Coin. An Onion can be made into a Roast Onion by being cooked at the Campfire next to the Swamp Pig Elder. Onions can be used in a variety of Cooking Recipes exclusive to The Gorge.

Recipes

×2

Trivia

  • The Onion was originally exclusive to The Gorge event, but it was later introduced into the main game along with the Warly Character Update.

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

“Looks crunchy.”
–Wilson, when examining an Onion.

–Willow, when examining an Onion.
“Wolfgang eats like apple when not cooking.”

“I never cry.”

–WX-78, when examining an Onion.

“I only cry tears of joy.”

“It's a pungent onion.”
–Maxwell, when examining an Onion.
“I dare thee, prövöke tears fröm mine eyes!”
–Wigfrid, when examining an Onion.
“It makes all our eyes water!”
–Webber, when examining an Onion.

–Warly, when examining an Onion.

–Wormwood, when examining an Onion.
“I hate chopping vegetables.”
–Winona, when examining an Onion.
“You'll see no tears from my eye. I cannot cry!”
–Wortox, when examining an Onion.
“Mmm-mmmm, crunchy!”
–Wurt, when examining an Onion.
“I hate chopping them.”
–Walter, when examining an Onion.
“I can smell the flavor!”
–Wanda, when examining an Onion.

When eaten raw, Onion restores 9.375 Hunger at the cost of 10 Sanity. They take 15 days to spoil.

–Woodie, when examining a Roasted Onion.
“Take that, onion.”

–Walter, when examining a Roasted Onion.
“I love the smell of cooked onion.”
–Wanda, when examining a Roasted Onion.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Hành tây là một loại thực phẩm thực vật trong Don't Starve Together. Hành có thể được trồng với tỉ lệ nhỏ xuất hiện từ Hạt giống thông thường hoặc trồng trực tiếp bằng Hạt hành. Cho chim trong Lồng Chim ăn Hành tây sẽ tạo ra 1 Hạt giống nhọn, kể từ bản cập nhật "Gặt những gì bạn gieo".

The '''Onion''' is a [[Vegetables|vegetable]] [[food]] item in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. Onions can be [[Farming/DST|farmed]] with a small chance to appear from normal [[Seeds/DST|Seeds]] or directly planted using Onion Seeds. Feeding an Onion to a bird in a [[Birdcage]] will produce 1 [[Crop Seeds/DST#Pointy Seeds|Pointy Seeds]], as of the "Reap What You Sow" update.

When eaten raw, Onion restores 9.375 [[Hunger]] at the cost of 10 [[Sanity]]. They take 15 days to spoil. 

It can be used as an ingredient in several [[Crock Pot]] recipes and is required for [[Salsa Fresca]], [[Bone Bouillon]], [[Grim Galette]] and [[Moqueca]].

== {{Pic|32|Silver Bowl}} The Gorge ==
{{Event|The Gorge}}
Onions are featured in ''[[The Gorge]]'' [[:Category:Events|event]] in ''Don't Starve Together''. They grow from Pointy Seeds, which can be bought from [[Sammy]] for one Old Coin. An Onion can be made into a Roast Onion by being cooked at the [[Campfire]] next to the [[Swamp Pig Elder]]. Onions can be used in a variety of [[The Gorge Recipes|Cooking Recipes]] exclusive to The Gorge.
==={{Pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipes ===
{{Recipe
|item1 = Garlic
|item2 = Mushroom
|item3 = Onions
|tool = Small Casserole Dish
|result = Stuffed Mushroom
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Flour
|item2 = Goat Milk
|item3 = Onions
|count3 = 2
|tool = Large Cookpot
|result =Onion Soup
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Flour
|item2 = Foliage
|item3 = Onions
|item4 = Crab Meat
|tool = Large Grill
|result =Crab Roll
}}
== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Onion was originally exclusive to ''The Gorge'' event, but it was later introduced into the main game along with the [[Warly]] [[Don't Starve Together/Version History|Character Update]].
